# Material Symbols Outlined (local)

Self-hosted copy to avoid Google Fonts and satisfy CSP without external style-src/font-src.

- **Source:** [Google Fonts – Material Symbols Outlined](https://fonts.google.com/icons?icon.style=Outlined) (opsz,wght,FILL,GRAD@48,200,0,0)
- **WOFF2:** From `fonts.gstatic.com/s/materialsymbolsoutlined/v315/...`
- **Usage:** `master.css` imports `material-symbols-outlined.css`; use class `material-symbols-outlined` and icon name as text (e.g. `<span class="material-symbols-outlined">menu</span>`).

To update the font later, replace `MaterialSymbolsOutlined.woff2` with a new download from the same Google Fonts URL and refresh the CSS if the family name or weights change.
